SubagentStop.command: git diff --quiet HEAD && git diff --cached --quiet || echo 'UNCOMMITTED CHANGES DETECTED: You have modified files that were not committed. You MUST fix any lint/type/test errors and commit your work before finishing. Run: pnpm lint, pnpm tsc --noEmit, pnpm test — then commit. Do NOT finish without committing.'

Stop.command: git diff --quiet HEAD && git diff --cached --quiet || echo 'REMINDER: There are uncommitted changes in the working tree.'
